<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by /forge:init — confidence: 97% -->
# Entity Model

## Plugin Artifacts (the product)

These are the file types that constitute the Forge plugin itself.

| Artifact | Location | Format | Owned By |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Command** | `forge/commands/*.md` | Markdown | Plugin source |
| **Hook** | `forge/hooks/*.js` | Node.js CJS | Plugin source |
| **Tool** | `forge/tools/*.cjs` | Node.js CJS | Plugin source |
| **Schema** | `forge/schemas/*.schema.json` | JSON Schema | Plugin source |
| **Meta-workflow** | `forge/meta/workflows/*.md` | Markdown | Plugin source |
| **Meta-persona** | `forge/meta/personas/*.md` | Markdown | Plugin source |
| **Meta-template** | `forge/meta/templates/*.md` | Markdown | Plugin source |
| **Meta-tool-spec** | `forge/meta/tool-specs/*.md` | Markdown | Plugin source |
| **Init phase** | `forge/init/**/*.md` | Markdown | Plugin source |
| **Plugin manifest** | `forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` | JSON | Plugin source |
| **Migration** | `forge/migrations.json` | JSON | Plugin source |
| **Config schema** | `forge/sdlc-config.schema.json` | JSON Schema | Plugin source |

## Store Entities (managed by the plugin in target projects)

These entities exist in `.forge/store/` within each project that uses Forge.
They are described in full in `engineering/architecture/database.md`.

| Entity | Key Fields | Relationships |
|---|---|---|
| **Sprint** | `sprintId`, `title`, `status`, `taskIds` | Has many Tasks, has many Events |
| **Task** | `taskId`, `sprintId`, `status`, `path`, `pipeline` | Belongs to Sprint, has many Events |
| **Bug** | `bugId`, `severity`, `status`, `path`, `reportedAt` | May reference similar Bugs |
| **Event** | `eventId`, `sprintId`, `role`, `action`, `phase`, `verdict` | Belongs to Sprint, optionally to Task |

## Release Entity (implicit)

A "release" is a version bump commit. It consists of:
- Updated `forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` (version)
- Updated `forge/migrations.json` (migration chain entry)
- Security scan report in `docs/security/scan-v{VERSION}.md`
- Updated README security table row

There is no explicit release record in the store — git history + migrations.json is the audit trail.
